title: avenula vasconica
intro: Avenula vasconica, also known as the Spanish oat grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Avenula vasconica include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Avenula vasconica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in combination with other herbs in traditional folk medicine.
